title: B.L.U.E.-J. - Seed Pitch
description: Title slide: company name, one-liner, date

title: Executive Summary
description: The full argument in 4 sentences: problem, solution, differentiation, ask

title: Problem: Coding education leaves 47% behind
description: Three broken levels: syntax-only, no continuity, no real output. Result: 47% dropout, $15K bootcamps

title: Solution: A mentor with a memory
description: Structured working memory, Clone Yourself curriculum, J.A.R.V.I.S. voice, full IDE

title: Moat: Three systems hard to copy
description: Memory schema, evaluation harness, telemetry curriculum loops. Barrier to entry

title: Market: $17.4B TAM, AI mentors fastest segment
description: TAM/SAM/SOM breakdown. Bootcamp vs self-taught vs AI mentor gap

title: Business Model: Four tiers from free to enterprise
description: Free/Pro/Team/University pricing table. Unit economics and path to $30K MRR

title: Traction: 74 days, 38 commits, with a validation plan
description: Live features, retention target, cohort experiment, benchmark

title: Ask: $750K seed, 18-month runway, 3 milestones
description: Use of funds, 3/6/12 month milestones. Engineering, acquisition, legal

title: Close: The widest chasm in tech education
description: Closing statement and one-liner. Thank you
